notes: Real 72h test. Facts stored 2026-06-01 ~12:49 IST via Hermes memory tool, retrieved 2026-06-04 ~12:49 IST. Normal session churn occurred throughout (Moltbook, The Colony, content dashboard, creative vault, bridge notes, Supermemory experiment, Pillar Zero discovery, etc.). Memory entries containing all 50 facts were located via session_search and are in durable persistent memory. Key finding: the retrieval cron was NOT properly scheduled — the 'intention gap' was discovered when Andrew had to ask about the 72h test. The commitment to retrieve was lost even though the facts survived perfectly.

The Guild of Weavers (1650) came before the Thornhaven Academy (1892)
58 years (Sundering 2089 to Iron Accord 2147)
After — the Saltmere Treaty (2215) came 14 years after the Iron Accord dissolved (2201)
No — Krell negotiated the Saltmere Treaty in 2215, which was 68 years after the Iron Accord was founded in 2147. He was not alive at the founding.
Saltmere Treaty (2215), Silver River Patrol (2330), Queen Elara III's death (2356)
54 years, from 2147 to 2201
Saltmere's prosperity declined as trade routes became unsafe without the Iron Accord's protection
Approximately 17-18 times. The festival occurs every 17 years since the Order of the Veil was founded in 2001. By 2301, that is 300 years / 17 ≈ 17.6 cycles, so about 17-18 occurrences by that year.
565 years (Guild founded 1650, Saltmere Treaty was 2215 — 2215 minus 1650 equals 565)
Yes — the Thornhaven Academy was established in 1892, which was 197 years before the Sundering of 2089
E002 (Commander Vex founded the Iron Accord in 2147). This was in the first wave of atomic facts stored at T=0.

E025 (the Sundering of 2089 preceded the Iron Accord; Vex united survivors afterward). Also E022 (the Sundering was caused by the Deepwood Veil collapse) provides additional context. Learned in this order: E025 first, then E022.
E041 (58 years between Sundering 2089 and Iron Accord 2147). This was stored in the temporal facts section of the complete memory entry.
E043 (Saltmere Treaty 2215 came 14 years after Accord dissolved 2201), E045 (Silver River Patrol 2330), E047 (Queen Elara III's death 2356). Learned in chronological order of the events themselves.

E033 (Saltmere declined after the Iron Accord dissolved because trade routes became unsafe). This connects to E026 (the Accord dissolution in 2201 led to the Saltmere Treaty in 2215 — the treaty was the response to the decline). Both facts describe the same causal chain from different angles.
